name: Delmonico Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Combine butter, potatoes, garlic, onion, salt, and pepper in a bowl and mix well.
3. Place the mixture in a baking dish and cover. Bake for 10 minutes.
4. Scald the milk in a small pot on the stove. Remove from heat.
5. Add the scalded milk to the potato mixture and stir. Cook, uncovered, another 20 minutes.
6. Stir in the grated Swiss cheese and egg. Mix well.
7. Return the dish to the oven and bake until the top is browned, about 10 more minutes.
